title: chylismia claviformis subsp. aurantiaca
intro: Chylismia claviformis subsp. aurantiaca, also known as the desert marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chylismia claviformis subsp. aurantiaca include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
